title: Question: enhancement to support SystemVerilog for loop multiple vars
body:
---


Author Name: **Jon Stahl**
Original Redmine Message: 3148 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi,

I would like to start using Verilator more generally at my company and have found v4.020 supports
almost all our code except for multiple var for loops e.g./

    always_comb
      begin
	for (int i=0,j=0; j<4; i=i+2,j++)
	  begin
	     if ( (!level1[i][7] && level1[i+1][7]) || (level1[i+1][7] && (level1[i+1][6:0] < level1[i][6:0])) )
	       level2[j] = level1[i+1];

I'm looking into enhancements to support this.
Would appreciate any guidance that can be offered.

Regards,
Jon
